creator: ps@mu.org
text:
Trying to debug a kernel panic, I was hoping to use netdump to capture the core but cxgbe does not support debugnet which means it cannot do netdump to write out crashdumps.

debugnet: overwriting mbuf zone pointers
debugnet_connect: interface 'cxl0' does not support debugnet
debugnet: restoring mbuf zone pointers
failed to contact netdump server
